mapper.select: select id as id, user_id as userId, doctor_no as doctorNo, dept_id as deptId, name as name, department as dept, title as title, phone as phone, specialty as specialty, introduction as introduction, avatar_url as avatarUrl, patient_count as patientCount, consultation_fee as consultationFee, work_status as workStatusCode, auth_status as authStatus, auth_remark as authRemark, rating as rating, status as status, create_time as createTime, update_time as updateTime, created_time as createdTime, updated_time as updatedTime, is_deleted as isDeleted from doctor_profile where id = #{id}

select id as id, user_id as userId, doctor_no as doctorNo, dept_id as deptId, name as name, department as dept, title as title, phone as phone, specialty as specialty, introduction as introduction, avatar_url as avatarUrl, patient_count as patientCount, consultation_fee as consultationFee, work_status as workStatusCode, auth_status as authStatus, auth_remark as authRemark, rating as rating, status as status, create_time as createTime, update_time as updateTime, created_time as createdTime, updated_time as updatedTime, is_deleted as isDeleted from doctor_profile order by id desc

select id, user_id as userId, doctor_no as doctorNo, name, department as dept, dept_id as deptId, work_status as workStatusCode, case work_status when 1 then 'FREE' when 2 then 'BUSY' else 'REST' end as workStatus, created_time as createdTime, updated_time as updatedTime from doctor_profile where is_deleted = 0 order by id desc
